name: Fresh Pear Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups pears (about 7 medium), sliced and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the sugar, flour, and mace and lightly toss with the sliced pears.
2. Place in an unbaked pie shell.
3. For topping, mix together 1 cup flour, 1/2 cup butter (softened), and 1/2 cup brown sugar.
4. Sprinkle the mixture on top of the pears.
5. Bake at 425 degrees for 50 minutes.
